extension.summary: Your streaming companion - a seamless bridge between Stremio and Kodi
extension.description: Add the manifest URL of any Stremio addon (catalog/meta/stream). Relay reads each manifest's declared resources and presents catalogs, metadata and streams natively in Kodi. Subtitles are handled by the companion service.subtitles.relay.
extension.news: v0.1.17 - Don't bounce to the return-app on stop while an arvio Remote is driving Kodi from a phone/tablet (Cast mode): Relay detects the live web-server client and skips the return-to-app so the remote keeps controlling. All other stops (on-device handoff, local playback) unchanged. v0.1.16 - Don't mark-watched or bounce to the return-app when a partial/broken stream stops early (its reported duration is far short of the title's real runtime) - fixes a flaky stream kicking you back to the launcher mid-watch. v0.1.15 - Return-to-app is now OS-aware: Android uses StartAndroidActivity (external handoff, unchanged); Apple TV/tvOS opens the app's URL scheme (e.g. stremio://) on stop. v0.1.13 - Skip / Up Next / Movie-end prompts now highlight the override button (one press flips it; wait it out for the timeout default), matching the resume prompt. v0.1.12 - GPL license, disclaimer; Trakt now needs your own app (see README).
extension.disclaimer: Relay is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Kodi/XBMC Foundation or Stremio. It ships no media, content or stream sources - it only presents add-ons that you choose to install. Do not use it for piracy or to access content you are not authorised to.
